SEARCH
Package me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatPlugin

Class ReplyManager

java.lang.Object
me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatPlugin.ReplyManager
public class ReplyManager extends Object
Manages the creation, storage, and formatting of chat replies within the plugin.

    Method
    Description
    void
    clearPendingReply(@Nullable UUID playerUUID)
    Clears the player's current reply state.

    Retrieves a specific message from a player's message history.

    Puts a player into "reply mode" targeting a specific message.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReplyManager

      public ReplyManager()

  • Method Details

    • saveLastMessage

      public void saveLastMessage(@Nullable @Nullable UUID senderUUID, @Nullable @Nullable UUID messageUUID, @Nullable @Nullable net.kyori.adventure.text.Component message)
      Saves a player's message to memory for future reply references.
      Parameters:
      senderUUID - The UUID of the player who sent the message.
      messageUUID - The unique identifier for this specific message.
      message - The component content of the message.

    • getLastMessage

      @Nullable public @Nullable net.kyori.adventure.text.Component getLastMessage(@Nullable @Nullable UUID playerUUID)
      Retrieves the most recent message sent by a specific player.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - The UUID of the player.
      Returns:
      The latest message component, or null if no messages are stored.

    • setReplying

      public void setReplying(@Nullable @Nullable UUID playerUUID, @Nullable @Nullable UUID messageUUID)
      Puts a player into "reply mode" targeting a specific message.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - The UUID of the player who is replying.
      messageUUID - The UUID of the message being replied to.

    • getExactPendingMessage

      @Nullable public @Nullable net.kyori.adventure.text.Component getExactPendingMessage(@Nullable @Nullable UUID playerUUID, @Nullable @Nullable UUID messageUUID)
      Retrieves a specific message from a player's message history.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - The UUID of the message author.
      messageUUID - The unique ID of the message.
      Returns:
      The message component, or null if not found.

    • getPendingReply

      @Nullable public @Nullable net.kyori.adventure.text.Component getPendingReply(@Nullable @Nullable UUID playerUUID)
      Checks if a player has an active pending reply and returns the original message.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - The UUID of the player checking for a reply state.
      Returns:
      The original message component being replied to, or null if not replying.

    • getPendingReplyMessageUUID

      public UUID getPendingReplyMessageUUID(@Nullable @Nullable UUID playerUUID)

    • clearPendingReply

      public void clearPendingReply(@Nullable @Nullable UUID playerUUID)
      Clears the player's current reply state.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - The UUID of the player.

    • reply

      public CompletableFuture<net.kyori.adventure.text.Component> reply(@NotNull @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component message, @NotNull @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component reply)
      Formats a reply by combining an icon, the truncated original message, and the new reply.
      Parameters:
      message - The original message component.
      reply - The new reply content.
      Returns:
      A CompletableFuture containing the fully formatted multi-line component.

    • truncate

      @Contract("_, _ -> new") public static @NonNull CompletableFuture<net.kyori.adventure.text.Component> truncate(@NotNull @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component original, int maxLength)
      Asynchronously truncates a component to a maximum character length.
      Parameters:
      original - The source component.
      maxLength - The maximum character limit.
      Returns:
      A future containing the truncated component with ellipsis if needed.

    • handleReply

      public void handleReply(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.entity.Player player, @NotNull @NotNull UUID targetUUID, @NotNull @NotNull UUID messageUUID)
      Handles the initiation of a reply, updating the state and notifying the player.
      Parameters:
      player - The player who is replying.
      targetUUID - The UUID of the author being replied to.
      messageUUID - The unique ID of the message being replied to.
